rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
Place input/output contracts in component type scope only when using visible features and concrete bounds.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries: component type annexes must use only visible ports, implementation annexes may bind to subcomponents.
Ensure AGREE declarations use only scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE blocks.
Boolean expressions must match port type; avoid numeric conversions from Boolean ports.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
Do not use integer or real literals to compare Boolean or opaque data ports.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
